title: metastelma harrisii
intro: Metastelma harrisii, also known as the Mexican climbing milkweed, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family that is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Metastelma harrisii include its use in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Metastelma harrisii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
